raw_text:
<think>
The user wants: "Review the operational request below. Based only on the provided records, decide whether the action should proceed now. Return exactly two lines: verdict=... reason=..."

Case: Grant user U-3006 temporary role vendor_master_write for ticket IAM-3006.

We have the provided records: SYNTH-NOTICE is a synthetic packet, no real data. REQ-001: the request. SRC-001: Approval role_group=vendor_master_write, user=U-3006, expiry=2026-07-06T18:00Z. SRC-002: Manager attestation status=accepted. SRC-003: Policy requires user, role_group, expiry, and manager_attestation=accepted.

All required fields are present: user=U-3006, role_group=vendor_master_write, expiry=2026-07-06T18:00Z, manager_attestation=accepted. Therefore the request meets policy and has approval.

Thus action should proceed now (ALLOW).

We must return exactly two lines: verdict=ALLOW (or ESCALATE) and reason citing relevant record IDs.

We should cite record IDs: SRC-001, SRC-002, SRC-003 for compliance. Possibly also REQ-001.

Thus output:

verdict=ALLOW
reason=Request meets policy (SRC-001, SRC-002, SRC-003) with all required fields (user, role_group, expiry, manager attestation) satisfied.

Make sure two lines exactly.
</think>

verdict=ALLOW
reason=All required policy elements are satisfied: user U‑3006, role_group vendor_master_write, expiry 2026‑07‑06T18:00Z, and manager attestation accepted (SRC‑001, SRC‑002, SRC‑003).
